stop_rule: Block endpoint if root_code not in C05 authority ledger.
Block event if source_root not in C05 authority ledger.
Block binding if endpoint_id not in C02/C03 endpoint catalogs.

artifact_scope: C10 command endpoint screen action matrix
stop_rule: Block command action if endpoint_id not in C02/C03 catalogs.

repair_action: None; all command actions are AR anchored in C10.

stop_rule: Block integration apply/publish if authn/authz, privacy/security, idempotency, reconciliation or conflict owner missing.

repair_action: Apply C04 problem catalog and C10 disabled/error-state rows to each command/read binding before implementation readiness.
stop_rule: Block unsafe command if problem detail and UI state are missing.

owner: Frontend Owner + Integration Owner + OT/Edge Owner
